summary: Iteration 46 - Attendance Management Page Fixes Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) No emojis visible on attendance management page, 2) Second tab correctly named 'خارج العمل الرسمي' (not 'خارج الدوام'), 3) Status update API POST /{employee_id}/update-status?date={date} works without 'Not Found' error, 4) 'تحضير' (Prepare) button visible and functional, 5) Edit status dialog works correctly through UI with proper save and success toast message.

emoji_removal.details: No emojis (🏢, 🟡, 💰, 🌙) found in visible page content. Only present in code comments (lines 5-7) which users don't see.

tab_name_change.details: Tab 1 correctly shows 'خارج العمل الرسمي' instead of old 'خارج الدوام'

status_update_api.test_result: Successfully changed status from 'ABSENT' to 'EXCUSED' via UI

tahdir_button.details: Button 'تحضير' visible in filter section with RefreshCw icon

edit_dialog.details: Edit dialog opens with date, status dropdown, reason textarea, and save/cancel buttons. Save works correctly.

response.message: تم تعديل حالة أ.سلطان الزامل إلى معذور

ui_tests.page_load: PASSED - Attendance management page loads correctly at /team-attendance
ui_tests.tabs_display: PASSED - Three tabs visible: الدوام الرسمي, خارج العمل الرسمي, معاملات الخصم
ui_tests.employee_list: PASSED - Employee rows display with badges for absence/deduction days
ui_tests.expand_details: PASSED - Clicking employee row expands to show daily details table
ui_tests.edit_button: PASSED - Edit button (pencil icon) visible in table rows
ui_tests.edit_dialog_flow: PASSED - Dialog opens, status can be changed, reason filled, save works, toast shows success

critical_code_review_comments: Emojis in lines 5-7 of AttendanceManagementPage.js are in code comments only, not user-visible - acceptable
API endpoint correctly changed from /correct-status to /{employee_id}/update-status?date=
STATUS_CONFIG object uses official company colors (emerald, red, amber, blue, purple, etc.) without emojis
Tab name 'خارج العمل الرسمي' correctly updated at line 425
seed_data_creation: Status for employee EMP-001 changed to EXCUSED via API test, and for م.نايف via UI test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance Management Page at /team-attendance fully functional. All reported issues fixed: 1) No emojis visible, 2) Tab renamed to 'خارج العمل الرسمي', 3) Status update API works (POST /{employee_id}/update-status?date=), 4) 'تحضير' button present, 5) Edit dialog fully functional with proper toast feedback.

verification_evidence.stats_update_verified: أيام الغياب changed from 2 to 1, إجمالي الخصم changed from 667 to 367
